subcodes.title: Words to Latimer, Esslemont, Randall et al, spoken on 1919-11-20
subcodes.first_line: In Persia every night there are several meetings in different places, held in the utmost supplication and submissiveness.
subcodes.subjects: @growth of the Cause, @unity; oneness of humanity, @rejection, opposition and persecution, @rejection of Muhammad, @historical episodes and the lessons of the past, @suffering; rejection of Christ
